name: runpod
description: Manage GPU workloads on Runpod — pods, serverless endpoints, jobs, templates, volumes — via the Runpod MCP server, runpodctl, and flash, with conceptual guidance and worked golden paths.

interface.shortDescription: Run any Runpod task agentically — pods, serverless, MCP, runpodctl, flash.
interface.longDescription: One entrypoint to manage GPU workloads on Runpod: a router that dispatches to the Runpod MCP server, runpodctl, flash, and companion CLIs, plus conceptual usage guidance and worked golden paths. Bundles the hosted Runpod MCP server config.
defaultPrompt: Create a pod with an RTX 4090.
Deploy a serverless endpoint from this image.
Which GPU should I use for a 13B model?
